FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f5cd726f560>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-12T19:00:44Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-12T18:59:05Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

2026/05/12 19:02:23.455878876 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/12 19:02:23.455886109 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/12 19:02:23.455946222 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/12 19:02:23.455947354 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/12 19:02:23.455973914 {
2026/05/12 19:02:23.455974996 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/12 19:02:23.455991457 new <- list()
2026/05/12 19:02:23.455992288 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456010412 new$width <- width
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456011334 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456055744 new$height <- height
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456057477 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456076102 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456077004 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456119033 new$title <- title
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456120335 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456138760 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456139872 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456158387 new$version <- version
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456159248 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456177963 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456178925 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456195867 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456196588 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456231413 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456232656 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456250509 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456251461 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456270186 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456278692 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456300102 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456301034 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/05/12 19:02:23.456343654 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456344676 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456361998 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456362860 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456381735 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456382587 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456402344 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456403125 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456441651 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456466447 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456503938 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456505260 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456524406 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456525258 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456550495 "default"))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456551367 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456568408 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456569290 }
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456585140 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456586021 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456606771 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456608043 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456625275 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456626137 }
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456643519 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456644321 }
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456660180 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456661082 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456680739 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456681701 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456709684 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456712218 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456747755 }
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456748747 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456761391 old$family <- family
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456762062 }
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456772301 version <- old$version

2026/05/12 19:02:23.456798530 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456799432 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456815753 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456816534 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456834237 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456835069 domain = NA)
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456850598 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/05/12 19:02:23.456873120 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/12 19:02:23.456898027 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
